game_info.title: Star Fetchers - Gangster Arena
game_info.concept:
The introduction to a wild ride with gangsters and deep state conspiracy theories

Note: This download includes the Pilot of Star Fetchers. Future installments will be available soon

Star Fetchers is a journey following two inner city thugs as they take on the hardest gangster there ever was. Star Fetchers is an adventure huffing on the fumes of 90's midnight TV, delivering a story paved with bizarre scenarios, ugly characters and high paced action. Follow the gang "The Thornz" as they crawl out of the slum and make it to the top.

Star Fetchers is a action packed adventure where the player will guide the main characters sword with his mouse and cut through enemies in adrenaline filled and aggressive battles. Use the sword and make precise cuts against foes, whilst you explore a decadent world filled with gangsters and low life.

Climb the ranks and become the most notorious gangster that ever lived. Battle other gangs, help out weirdos and learn the horrible secrets of the notorious demilitarized district "The Gray zone". Star Fetchers offers a bizarre story with light RPG elements and high paced action.

Sects, the government, violence, weirdness, decadence, conspiracies, ugliness, cute girls. Is what describes Star Fetchers the best
game_info.description: You're a street thug armed with a deadly blade, fighting your way through waves of rival gangsters in the notorious Gray Zone. Slice through enemies with precise sword strikes, collect power-ups to boost your abilities, and survive as long as possible while climbing the criminal ranks. The conspiracy deepens with each wave—how far can you make it before the deep state brings you down?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Dash forward to evade enemies or close distance
Z: Swing your sword to slash nearby enemies
Shift: Activate slow-motion mode (limited duration, recharges over time)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement, enemy spawning, and collision detection. Verifying that the player can navigate the arena, enemies spawn correctly, and damage is properly applied on contact.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in circular patterns around the arena to test all movement directions. Allow enemies to spawn and approach. Test collision detection by letting enemies touch the player to verify damage is applied.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly in all directions. Enemies should spawn periodically and move toward the player. Health should decrease when enemies make contact. Test is successful if all basic mechanics work without errors for 30 seconds.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing combat mechanics including sword attacks, enemy defeat, and score progression. Verifying that the sword can damage and eliminate enemies, and that the score increases appropriately.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Actively seek out and attack spawning enemies using the sword. Use dash to close distance quickly. Try to eliminate multiple enemies in succession to test combo mechanics and score accumulation.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Sword attacks should damage and eliminate enemies on contact. Score should increase for each enemy defeated. Player should be able to sustain combat for at least 45 seconds, eliminating at least 10 enemies. Test is successful if combat feels responsive and rewarding.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing special abilities including dash and slow-motion mechanics. Verifying cooldowns, visual effects, and tactical advantages of special moves.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Alternate between using dash to evade dangerous situations and slow-motion to line up precise attacks. Test resource management by depleting and allowing abilities to recharge.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Dash should provide quick movement burst with brief invulnerability. Slow-motion should reduce game speed significantly. Both abilities should have clear visual feedback and proper cooldown periods. Test is successful if abilities feel impactful and strategic.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing difficulty progression and wave system. Verifying that enemy count and difficulty increase appropriately as the player survives longer and scores higher.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Survive as long as possible while actively eliminating enemies. Monitor enemy spawn rate, movement speed, and overall difficulty as time progresses.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Enemy spawn rate should gradually increase. Enemies should become slightly faster or more aggressive over time. Difficulty should scale smoothly without sudden spikes. Test is successful if the game remains challenging but fair for at least 60 seconds.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing power-up system including collection and effects. Verifying that power-ups spawn correctly, can be collected, and provide meaningful benefits.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Prioritize collecting any power-ups that spawn while maintaining combat effectiveness. Test each power-up type to verify its effect (health restoration, damage boost, etc.).
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Power-ups should spawn periodically at random locations. Collecting them should provide immediate visual and mechanical feedback. Effects should be noticeable and beneficial. Test is successful if power-ups add strategic depth to gameplay.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing game over conditions and restart functionality. Verifying that the game properly transitions to game over when health reaches zero and allows restart.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies until health depletes completely. Verify game over screen appears with final score. Test restart functionality by pressing R key.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game should transition to game over screen when health reaches zero. Final score and survival time should be displayed. Pressing R should return to start screen. Test is successful if all transitions are smooth and game state resets properly.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing optimal win strategy by maximizing survival time and score. Attempting to survive for extended period using all mechanics effectively.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Use aggressive but calculated combat approach. Eliminate enemies efficiently while managing health. Utilize all abilities strategically. Collect power-ups when safe. Maintain awareness of enemy positions and spawn patterns.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Should be able to survive for 90+ seconds and achieve score over 30. Demonstrate mastery of all game mechanics including movement, combat, abilities, and power-up collection. Test is successful if optimal play results in consistent high scores.
